title: Return NamesHistory when returning remote images
body:
We are returning bogus data in podman-remote images --format json.
This change will match the same data returned my podman images --format json.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

Does this match what the Docker compat handler expects?
I have no idea, But what we were returning was bogus. This matches our API
Confirmed: the BATS 'image history' test now works against this build. Thanks.
